title: QuickOrganizer
description: A smart inventory organizer mod for Minecraft Fabric - Sort your inventory with a single key press!
body:
# QuickOrganizer

A Minecraft Fabric mod that provides quick and easy inventory organization features.

## Features

- **One-click inventory sorting** - Sort your inventory with a single key press
- **Smart item organization** - Automatically categorize and stack items  
- **Customizable keybinds** - Configure your preferred hotkeys
- **Multi-container support** - Works with player inventories, chests, and other containers

## Usage

Press the configured key (default: `O`) while holding an item or with a container open to sort.

## Installation

1. Install Fabric Loader and Fabric API
2. Drop the mod JAR into your `mods` folder
3. Launch the game
